description: This JOOTUEPO accessory brings colour, elegance and personality to your everyday life – ideal for travelling, the office, dates or special occasions. A great gift idea for style-conscious women. - Elegance meets versatility – the silk scarf for style, colour and charm in one accessory - Whether in summer as sun protection or in winter to keep you warm – this versatile scarf suits every occasion and gives your look that certain something - Our high-quality silk scarf made of 100% polyester offers you a soft and luxurious feel that resembles a real silk scarf This cotton scarf can be washed in the machine or by hand, but should not be tumble dried. Do not soak for long periods of time, and dark and light-coloured clothing should be washed separately.
